# Test Coverage TODO — Generated by cover-your-tracks

> This file captures testing gaps that cannot be covered immediately.
> Each entry describes what changed, what needs testing, why it matters,
> and what form of test would be appropriate once infrastructure exists.
>
> Review this file periodically. When a TODO is resolved (tests written or
> change superseded), remove the entry and commit the update.

---

## [Component or File Changed]

- **What changed:** [brief description of the code change]
- **What needs testing:** [specific behaviour, edge case, or contract to validate]
- **Suggested test form:** [unit / integration / property / snapshot / contract / other]
- **Why it matters:** [risk of regression, correctness gap, or broken contract]
- **Date noted:** [YYYY-MM-DD]
